design_philosophy: The UI must communicate instant visual confirmation and extreme clarity. The interaction is for a large touch screen (kiosk), meaning enormous typography, massive touch targets, and high-contrast readable elements. We abandon the 'admin receipt' look for a premium, Apple-style self-service terminal experience.

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter text-gray-900
hierarchy.amount: text-5xl sm:text-7xl lg:text-8xl font-black font-mono tracking-tighter text-emerald-600
hierarchy.mono_data: font-mono text-xl sm:text-2xl lg:text-3xl font-semibold text-gray-900
hierarchy.label: text-sm sm:text-base lg:text-lg uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500 font-bold

kiosk_container.description: Full screen layout with the custom background, centering the main content block.
kiosk_container.styles: min-h-screen w-full flex items-center justify-center bg-cover bg-center bg-no-repeat relative

receipt_bento_card.description: A massive, ultra-premium glassmorphism-inspired white card holding all the data. It uses a strong shadow to pop off the screen.
receipt_bento_card.styles: w-full max-w-5xl mx-auto bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-[0_30px_100px_-15px_rgba(0,0,0,0.15)] rounded-[40px] border border-white p-12 lg:p-16 flex flex-col gap-12 relative overflow-hidden

success_header.description: Top section with animated checkmark and success title.
success_header.styles: flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center gap-6

amount_display_box.description: A dedicated high-contrast block for the total paid amount.
amount_display_box.styles: w-full bg-emerald-50 rounded-3xl p-10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center gap-2 border border-emerald-100

receipt_details_grid.description: A 2-column CSS grid displaying the receipt data pairs cleanly.
receipt_details_grid.styles: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-x-12 gap-y-8 w-full px-4

done_button.description: Massive touch target for the kiosk with an internal shrinking progress bar indicating timeout.
done_button.styles: relative overflow-hidden w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto h-28 bg-gray-900 rounded-3xl text-3xl font-bold text-white transition-transform active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer shadow-2xl hover:bg-gray-800

done_button_progress.description: The absolute div inside the done button that animates width from 100% to 0%.

page_enter.props: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 40 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.7, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }}

success_icon_scale.props: initial={{ scale: 0 }} animate={{ scale: 1 }} transition={{ type: 'spring', bounce: 0.5, duration: 0.8 }}

button_progress.props: initial={{ scaleX: 1 }} animate={{ scaleX: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 10, ease: 'linear' }}

audio_effects.instruction: Retain the exact `playSuccessSound()` and `playPaperFeedSound()` AudioContext logic from the current KioskReceipt.jsx. Execute them in a useEffect on mount.

accessibility.contrast: Maintained high contrast text (gray-900 on white, emerald-600 on emerald-50).
accessibility.touch_targets: Button is h-28 (112px), well above kiosk minimum sizes.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building the UI for `/huurders/:companyId` (Tenant Kiosk). Do not just render the admin `<ReceiptTicket />` component. Build a completely new, bespoke KIOSK layout for the payment success screen using pure Tailwind and HTML elements.

Target file: Create or update the relevant payment success component (e.g. `PaymentConfirm.jsx` or create `TenantPaymentSuccessScreen.jsx` based on how routing is set up in HuurdersLayout). Verify which file handles the success state for the tenant kiosk.
Use Framer Motion to orchestrate a beautiful entrance: Card slides up, Checkmark pops in, Amount scales up.
Make sure to extract all required data from the `payment` object passed as prop (receipt number, date, tenant name, apartment, payment method, amount paid, remaining balance).
Keep the `AudioContext` sound generation functions exactly as they are in the current codebase (e.g. `playSuccessSound()`) but trigger them appropriately when the success screen renders.
Implement the 'Klaar' (Done) button with a visual countdown: use a framer-motion `motion.div` inside the button that scales on the X-axis (`scaleX: 0`) over the 10 or 12 seconds countdown duration.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'JetBrains Mono' for all data values.
Ensure `data-testid` attributes are placed on the main container, the amount, and the done button.
Apply the generated `kiosk_bg` image as the background of the main wrapper using inline style or Tailwind arbitrary value: `backgroundImage: 'url(...)', backgroundSize: 'cover'`.

kiosk_bg.description: A subtle, ultra-modern minimalist geometric background texture. Apply to the outermost screen wrapper.

icons.success: Lucide CheckCircle (size: w-32 h-32 or w-40 h-40)
